zh.lifeSummary: Eleanor Despencer是Sir Hugh le Despenser和Mary de Quincy的女兒，於大約1252年出生。她於大約1271年與Hugh Courtenay I在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1328年9月30日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年77歲，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eleanor Despencer是Sir Hugh le Despenser和Mary de Quincy的女儿，于大约1252年出生。她于大约1271年与Hugh Courtenay I在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1328年9月30日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年77岁，埋葬在英国戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Eleanor Despencer was born about 1252 as the daughter of Sir Hugh le Despenser and Mary de Quincy. She married Hugh Courtenay I about 1271, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 30 September 1328, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Eleanor Despencer est née environ 1252, fille de Sir Hugh le Despenser et Mary de Quincy. Elle a épousé Hugh Courtenay I environ 1271, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 septembre 1328, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Eleanor Despencer wurde um 1252, als Tochter von Sir Hugh le Despenser und Mary de Quincy geboren. Sie hat um 1271 in Devon, England Hugh Courtenay I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. September 1328 im Alter von 77 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Eleanor Despencer è nata il circa 1252 come figlia di Sir Hugh le Despenser e Mary de Quincy. Lei sposato Hugh Courtenay I circa 1271, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 30 settembre 1328, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Despencerは約1252年にSir Hugh le DespenserとMary de Quincyの娘として生まれた。約1271年にイギリスデボンでHugh Courtenay Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1328年9月30日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで77歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Despencer(은)는 대략 1252년 Sir Hugh le Despenser(와)과 Mary de Quincy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1271년 영국 데폰에서 Hugh Courtenay I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 9월 30일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eleanor Despencer nasceu aproximadamente 1252 filha de Sir Hugh le Despenser e Mary de Quincy. Ela casou-se com Hugh Courtenay I aproximadamente 1271, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1328, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Eleanor Despencer родилась около 1252 г. Её родителей звали Sir Hugh le Despenser и Mary de Quincy. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Courtenay I около 1271 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 30 сентября 1328 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности эксетир, девон, Англия.
